chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S- 75 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.1358 of 2025. U/A. 2. For orders on office objection-A. 3. For orders on MA No.1359 of 2025. E/A 4. For hearing of main case. 10.03.2025. Miss Ghulam Khadija Bhatti, Advocate for the Applicant. ------- Learned Counsel submits that at the first instance she wishes to approach to learned trial court for the relief sought in the instant application, hence not press the same. Accordingly, it stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. J U D G E S.Ashfaq
